package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_collection_iteration_manual_index_loop_without_bounds_need: Layer: Collection iteration. Flag manual index loops over slices where range would avoid repeated bounds-sensitive indexing.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule516NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario516Negative(records []Rule516NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
